conbody.p: Overview: The Review Rates report helps to compare review rates for each CDS. This report displays count of discharged encounters and count of encounters reviewed for each CDS between the selected date range.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE Triage CDE Triage Dashboard Review Rates .

The Review Rates displays the following:
Summary Card
Review Rates by CDS Chart
Review Rates by Highest Rank Chart
Encounter details Tabular Chart
For filters on all pages, refer .

ul.li: The Summary Card at the right side of the Review Rates report displays the total number of discharged encounters, total reviews, and the review rate between the selected date range.
Formula: Review rate = (Total Reviews/ Total Discharges) × 100.

p.b: Review Rates - Review Rates by CDS

ul.li: In the Review Rates by CDS chart, X-axis indicates the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter in CDS Triage, and Y-axis indicates the review rate. Tooltip displays count of reviews and discharges for each CDS.
Encounters that do not have any CDS assigned are displayed under the Unassigned CDS category on the Y-axis.

p.b: Review Rates - Review Rate by Highest Rank Chart

fig.title: Review Rate by Highest Rank Chart

ul.li: In the Review Rate by Highest Rank chart, the donut chart displays review rate for each Highest Rank. Tooltip displays the count of discharges and reviews for each Highest Rank.
